name: Black Bean Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons cumin seeds, or to taste
5 drops green Tabasco Sauce, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a 6-8 quart pan over medium heat.
2. Add onion and cook, stirring frequently, until golden brown (about 20 minutes).
3. Add chicken broth.
4. Add tomatoes, cumin, beans, and green Tabasco.
5. Mix well to break up refried beans.
6. Remove half the mixture and puree with a blender.
7. Return pureed portion to cooking pot.
8. Taste and correct seasonings.
9. Bring to a simmer and cook another six or seven minutes, stirring frequently, until soup begins to thicken and flavors are blended.
10. Serve with one or more of the following condiments: shredded low-fat cheddar cheese, nonfat sour cream, cilantro sprigs, baked tortilla chips.
